name: OurRevolution.com
subject: [RSVP] Bernie Sanders & Elizabeth Warren's national livestream
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers:
Our Revolution is hosting Senators Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren for a livestream event this Friday to have an open, honest and frank conversation with you on the state of our national politics.
RSVP to be emailed the link so you can watch this conversation with Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren on strategies to not just resist, but to grow our progressive movement and present a positive vision for the future of our country.
**[Our Revolution Livestream with Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0abf/43f17890/dffb3b6d/6203fd69/88078374/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/our-revolution-livestream-with-bernie-sanders-and-elizabeth-warren-rsvp?source=em170329-full")**
Friday, March 31, 2017
7:00 PM EDT
RSVP today to be emailed the link to watch
**[RSVP TO WATCH»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0abf/43f17890/dffb3b6d/6203fd69/88078374/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/our-revolution-livestream-with-bernie-sanders-and-elizabeth-warren-rsvp?source=em170329-full")**
Together, we can create real momentum behind our progressive agenda and bring these policies to Washington and state capitols across America. We hope you will join Bernie and Elizabeth this Friday for this powerful discussion.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0abf/43f17890/dffb3b6d/6203fd16/88078374/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0abf/43f17890/dffb3b6d/6203fd17/88078374/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0abf/43f17890/dffb3b6d/6203fd14/88078374/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Keith Ellison
subject: A very short email re: tomorrow's deadline
body:
Let's close March strong.
---
**Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is tomorrow, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $10 or more right now.

Tomorrow's an important day. It's the first quarterly fundraising deadline of this big, busy year.

Let's give it everything we've got. Pitch in $10 or whatever you can now.

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 3/30/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
President Donald J. Trump is taking action to build a dynamic, booming economy that works for all Americans. Today, he will also meet with the Prime Minister of Denmark, strengthening our alliance with a country that stands shoulder-to-shoulder with the United States in our commitment to defeating ISIS.

**AFTERNOON:**
* **12:00PM** : President Trump hosts a Legislative Affairs lunch on opioid and drug abuse
* **3:10PM** : President Trump meets with Prime Minister Lars Lokke Rasmussen of Denmark
* **3:25PM** : President Trump leads an expanded bilateral meeting with Prime Minister Rasmussen

**FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9b5cd17b5c7d14ce6c8b3b336605f452eb7e6051b10de4108ac04ffea87210720f29da00988ec379f4cbff533d9470de1a452ac780eccdd)

[Retweet](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76af45f8f61a62337d6fd9e2365644955bc3194a441d6ddb2b42d99d1c202fc0b03300413d1af1acdb3aad4bb6947195aed75dc0cb7b6c0f)

President Trump speaks at the Women's Empowerment Panel.
[Read Remarks](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76af45f8f61a6233926bc15e46139230c7d8f71c5ce639bdae509053d9071c8b629c56dcbecf27280137ccde7e32b2719ea8186251475a33)

President Trump holds a listening session on opioid and drug abuse.

President Trump signs an Executive Order Establishing the President’s Commission on Combating Drug Addiction and the Opioid Crisis.
[Read the Executive Order](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76af45f8f61a623305f58527f60b5c93ad688e6b2dd5f50f889f847d8d2dc228952ff0bcfeb84083f941c1ac399a56b7bc3f121a405c6bbb)

**WHITE HOUSE UPDATES**
**Photo of the Day:**

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76af45f8f61a6233c44465aadd7ec0e09bd0b83af3dc89a1efd4e5d326b15f2a8c5d2b8784857bce0b4edd555a1a558fed5d4ae0ea741c8d)
The White House Easter Egg Roll is a timeless White House tradition, dating back to 1878 and the presidency of President Rutherford B. Hayes. This photo is from the Easter Egg Roll in 1889. (Library of Congress Online Catalog). [View Photo](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76af45f8f61a6233c44465aadd7ec0e09bd0b83af3dc89a1efd4e5d326b15f2a8c5d2b8784857bce0b4edd555a1a558fed5d4ae0ea741c8d)
This year's White House Easter Egg Roll will be held on April 17, 2017 on the South Lawn of the White House.

**PRESS ROOM**
Watch yesterday's press briefing with Sean Spicer:
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76af45f8f61a62330ba1508c8c588aa660d3ed4dc4c84b226fa33b15c365d24c445815c3799a6f7530dc822dcbaef3d729db1a5894fe979f)

Today's press briefing will take place at 1:30PM ET in the White House Briefing Room with Press Secretary Sean Spicer. [Watch it LIVE here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76af45f8f61a6233dacd9826b1c806a3baed7a990c98dddc5b225e5e49a8c52071e24b9c751ba38d3b906487ade791973d9bbf641a9c3d0e)

**NEWS REPORTS**

* _The Washington Times:_ "Melania Trump: Era of brutality against women, children ‘is over’"

* _Breitbart:_ "Exclusive: Secretary Ryan Zinke Ready to Restore Trust in the Interior Department"

name: Sen. Maggie Hassan (via DSCC)
subject: We have to hold our ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm proud to write you as the U.S. Senator from New Hampshire after our hard-fought victory in 2016. You and the DSCC made it possible.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democrats-resistance-fund?refcode=DPE-20170330-Hassan-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

I'm proud to write you as the U.S. Senator from New Hampshire after our hard-fought victory in 2016.

You and the DSCC helped make it possible. As dark money groups overwhelmingly targeted our campaign -- making the race to unseat Kelly Ayotte one of the most expensive ever -- you helped grassroots Democrats prevail.

And because you stood with me, we won by just over 1,000 votes. That narrow margin is a reminder that we can never get complacent when the stakes are so high.

So today, I'm asking you step up like you did for me to make sure that 25 members of the Democratic caucus defend their seats in 2018 (including 10 in states that Donald Trump won).

**[Will you join me in supporting the DSCC's work to keep Democrats fighting in the Senate, friend? Please, pitch in whatever you can before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democrats-resistance-fund?refcode=DPE-20170330-Hassan-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

You and I both know that we can't afford to lose any of our progressive champions. Senate Democrats are holding the last, best line of defense against Trump's and Mitch McConnell's extreme policies.

That's exactly why right-wing groups are deploying upwards of $10 million on the Supreme Court fight, and it's why Trump is on the campaign trail lobbying mega-donors for a filibuster-proof majority.

It doesn't surprise me -- I saw firsthand the staggering amounts that GOP billionaires will spend to drown out anyone who stands in the way of their agenda.

The only way we keep our Senate Democrats fighting for hard-working families is to be stronger -- and to make sure that we band together to move razor-thin races toward Democratic victory in 2018.

**[I'm not taking anything for granted, friend, so I'm standing with the DSCC to protect my fellow Democratic Senators in the fights ahead. Can I count on you to join me before the FEC deadline?](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democrats-resistance-fund?refcode=DPE-20170330-Hassan-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for everything you do.

With every good wish,

Senator Maggie Hassan

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2f4/2b07114c/596b3dc4/736b40ef/3225541069/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2f4/2b07114c/596b3dc4/736b40ee/3225541069/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2f4/2b07114c/596b3dc4/736b40e9/3225541069/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Donna Brazile
subject: I'm still cheering for you
body:
Let's finish March out strong
---
**Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is tomorrow, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $3 or more right now.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca60/4067b0a/2e249da75/7e70dd77/941580369/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170330_db_nd1&source=em_20170330_db_nd1&refcode=em_20170330_db_+nd1")**
Friend --

It's been a minute since the last time I reached out to you, but with the first quarterly FEC deadline of the year tomorrow, I had to check in.

I've been taking notice of the enthusiasm and passion that grassroots Democrats like you have been putting in to fight back against this administration and some truly disgraceful Republican plans.

Because of folks like you, we stopped Donald Trump and Paul Ryan in their tracks when they tried to take our health care away. We showed immigrants and refugees an outpouring of love and put up a massive resistance to Trump's unconstitutional Muslim ban. I have been cheering you on and speaking out with you, and together we showed that when people get involved and get active, we can change history.

But as important as these victories are, we can't sit back and relax. Donald Trump is still president, with everything that entails -- just yesterday, he signed an executive order rolling back President Obama's Clean Power Plan and letting polluting corporations run rampant over our environment. And in a few short weeks, there's a special election in Georgia where we have an opportunity to win back a seat in the House and hand Trump and Ryan their first major electoral defeat.

Let our successes this far fuel our drive to keep raising our voices, keep resisting, and keep this powerful grassroots movement going. Before the deadline tomorrow, pitch in $3 or more to stand with Democrats and keep up the fight.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Weekly Address TOMORROW
body:
Tune in at 10AM ET Tomorrow. |

Last week, Judge Gorsuch completed his four day hearing with the Senate Judiciary Committee. Dozens of hours and hundreds of questions later, one fact became crystal clear: Judge Gorsuch is exceedingly qualified to become the next Justice of the Supreme Court.

President Donald J. Trump nominated Judge Gorsuch because of his unwavering dedication to equal justice under the law, strict constitutional principles, and his history of fighting for all Americans.

**For a special message about Judge Gorsuch and more, don’t miss President Trump’s Weekly Address to the Nation, tomorrow at 10AM ET.** Tuning in is simple:

subject: Resisting Trump at the local level >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dad/24c69fd9/f2a9835a/18e3958b/3195946250/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE332N_digital_email_20170330_XWomen_inact&source=WQEFE332N_digital_email_20170330_XWomen_inact")
---

Peter,

We've had over 10,000 women throughout every single state and D.C. reach out to us about running for school board, city council, county board, and state legislative seats -- including women from Virginia too.

Take a moment to think of what those women will be able to do with the full force of our more than five-million-person community behind them.

**[Make sure we can help Virginia women not only run for office, but WIN. Donate $3 to help reach our $180,000 End-of-Quarter goal.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dad/24c69fd9/f2a9835a/18e39584/3195946250/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Make+sure+we+can+help+CUSTOMDATASETslug2&utm_campaign=WQEFE332N_digital_email_20170330_XWomen_inact&source=WQEFE332N_digital_email_20170330_XWomen_inact") **

The wave of women who want to run for office are the KEY to resisting the Trump administration. Because state legislatures, county boards, and city councils have a huge impact on our daily lives.

All of the states that have tried to defund Planned Parenthood? That wouldn't happen if we elected more pro-choice Democratic women in our state legislatures.

Want more sanctuary cities that protect undocumented immigrants who just want to work hard and raise their families? Or want police brutality to be addressed? Mayors and city councils decide that.

Tired of hearing about outrageous abstinence-only sex education in our public schools? School boards can make sure students are taught comprehensive, age-appropriate sex ed.

The investments we make to help women run and win at the state and local level right now could have an impact not just on the next few years, but in the decades to come. The women we train this cycle? They very well could be our next governors, members of Congress, and future presidents.

**It's a big vision, and it can only go as big as the resources we have to make it happen. It all starts with hitting our End-of-Quarter goal. Donate $3 now to start our work off strong:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-The-March-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dad/24c69fd9/f2a9835a/18e39585/3195946250/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitTheMarchGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE332N_digital_email_20170330_XWomen_inact&source=WQEFE332N_digital_email_20170330_XWomen_inact")**

Thanks,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: we need to push back hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Every day I feel the weight of the critical work we have before us: defending the principles and rights that are so fundamental to our democracy and pushing back against the reckless Trump/GOP agenda.

Together my Senate Democratic colleagues and I represent the last, best line of defense against these extreme policies. That's why Trump is out there pushing GOP billionaires to raise funds to try to win a filibuster proof Senate in 2018. But we can't -- and won't -- let that happen.

[**I 'm reaching out to you today, team to ask if you can help support the work I'm doing to make sure that Senate Democrats hold their seats in 2018? >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b13/70cdc2ba/474871d9/397fe09/230998489/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033017&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+reaching+out+to+you+today+FIRSTN&utm_campaign=em033017&source=em033017")

As the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) it's my job to make sure that we are ready for whatever Republicans throw at the 25 members of the Senate Democratic Caucus up for reelection next year. It's a big job, but when Senator Schumer reached out I agreed because I know just how critical this next election will be to our party and our country.

I hope I can count on grassroots champions like you to stick by me as I work to help our candidates, who will be under constant attack in the fight ahead.

Right-wing groups are getting ready to spend over $10 million on the Supreme Court fight alone. We need to work together to push back hard against their disinformation campaigns and defend our members who need to win in states that helped elect Trump in 2016.

I am working as hard as I can to make sure we meet and win that challenge. [**Can I count on you to join me? Contribute now to help out before tomorrow 's FEC deadline. >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b13/70cdc2ba/474871d9/397fe06/230998489/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033017&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+join+me+Contribute&utm_campaign=em033017&source=em033017")

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Here's how we take on extreme Republicans - and win:
body:
Let's close March strong. **Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is tomorrow, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $10 or more right now.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca75/4067b0a/2e22e4af7/7e7090ca/63826869/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170330_tm_v2s2&source=em_20170330_tm_v2s2&refcode=em_20170330_tm_v2s2")**
Friend --

When I ran for governor four years ago, they called my opponent "Tea Party before there was a Tea Party." He made shutting down women's health centers in Virginia his personal crusade. He was the very first state attorney general to sue the Obama administration in an attempt to thwart the Affordable Care Act.

So let's just say I have some experience taking on the most extreme kind of Republican in a tough race -- and winning.

Four years ago, we beat the odds and turned Virginia blue because we stuck to our core Democratic values. Creating good-paying jobs and protecting affordable health care. Standing up for the rights of every person in our commonwealth so they could be who they are, love the person they love, and have every opportunity to succeed.

**[But we also won because we were smart, planned ahead, and organized early -- and had the resources to do it. If we're going to beat Trump and the GOP, we have to do the same thing my campaign did in Virginia but on a national scale.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca75/4067b0a/2e22e4af7/7e7090c8/63826869/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+But+we+also+won+because+we+were+smart+pl&utm_campaign=em_20170330_tm_v2s2&source=em_20170330_tm_v2s2&refcode=em_20170330_tm_v2s2")**

Democrats can't wait until 2018 or 2020 to start training the next generation of candidates, building the tools and infrastructure campaigns rely on, or putting boots on the ground in key states and races.

But I can tell you from experience that none of that comes cheap.

That's why you're hearing so much about this deadline. It really does matter, and the DNC will start making decisions about what Democrats can -- or can't -- do over the next few years based on what's in the bank tomorrow night.

I'm coming to you today because I need you to do what you did for me four years ago, and make sure Democrats have everything it takes to win close races against tough opponents. If you can chip in $10 before the deadline, click here and donate now:

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca75/4067b0a/2e22e4af7/7e7090d6/63826869/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170330_tm_v2s2&source=em_20170330_tm_v2s2&refcode=em_20170330_tm_v2s2")

clean_body: Let's close March strong. Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is tomorrow, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $10 or more right now. "" Friend -- When I ran for governor four years ago, they called my opponent "Tea Party before there was a Tea Party." He made shutting down women's health centers in Virginia his personal crusade. He was the very first state attorney general to sue the Obama administration in an attempt to thwart the Affordable Care Act. So let's just say I have some experience taking on the most extreme kind of Republican in a tough race -- and winning. Four years ago, we beat the odds and turned Virginia blue because we stuck to our core Democratic values. Creating good-paying jobs and protecting affordable health care. Standing up for the rights of every person in our commonwealth so they could be who they are, love the person they love, and have every opportunity to succeed. "" Democrats can't wait until 2018 or 2020 to start training the next generation of candidates, building the tools and infrastructure campaigns rely on, or putting boots on the ground in key states and races. But I can tell you from experience that none of that comes cheap. That's why you're hearing so much about this deadline. It really does matter, and the DNC will start making decisions about what Democrats can -- or can't -- do over the next few years based on what's in the bank tomorrow night. I'm coming to you today because I need you to do what you did for me four years ago, and make sure Democrats have everything it takes to win close races against tough opponents. If you can chip in $10 before the deadline, click here and donate now: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: All of us
body:
This isn't about me.
#
Team -
When I first ran for City Council in Tallahassee, my mother was one of the few people who donated to my campaign. She contributed what she could, $20, because she's my mother -- she loves and supports me.
Since that campaign so many years ago, things have changed quite a bit. In less than a month, we've received over 3,000 individual contributions. But what is most inspiring about these contributions is that people aren't donating because of familial obligation or because they care about me personally, like my mother did. They're contributing because they care about all Floridians, and they want a better, more effective government.
This campaign isn't about me -- it's about all of us coming together to transform Florida into a state that works for all of us.
[**If you 'd like to join the over 3,000 supporters who have come together in this noble pursuit for a better state for all of us, you can do so here.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33a0/9e00690/49b9e324/24035bdb/3795204486/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-march2017?refcode=em20170330-mom")
We have less than 48 hours before our first fundraising filing deadline, and because of you and the thousands of other supporters who have contributed to our campaign, I believe we're going to file numbers we can all be proud of -- numbers that demonstrate that this is a people-powered campaign.
Thank you for everything. I'm excited to see what we can accomplish together by 11:59 PM tomorrow.
Bring it home,
Andrew

Peter,
The past few weeks have been an exciting time on the campaign trail as we share Jill's conservative message of less government and more liberty. All across Virginia, Republicans are unifying behind Jill Vogel for lieutenant governor because they see in her a proven conservative who can help our ticket to victory this November.
Just this morning, Christopher Newport University's Watson Center for Public Policy released a [new poll showing Jill Vogel leading the race for the Republican nomination](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00145QqqcuWKp3_dGfPfAgXG4UsHhLlGdkLsosM8WI_XgRgd7EvnL4O_93A9jiynMNllZANhrPKvYwb8qG99K8VfdpZBCypj_aggRzx39JUfj7f2ReIxGpLhQSZP7nxpeZ4aDdpkFIerXrSXn6ExX_GuJWApPiJoD01Hc3ouXrMeEsEB4mZksBuMN5HMNgGxKDcPrPx0EvYJUBbtKMLbbes9YqyqmQe1Uj9eUHAyCxgs_TvNbHZpTDGnFdEmnxVxWoYe0JKDtQ_D06-rrtANYcC2hrA3LwrjfaKT8gc1wKmNiKbkPmg_NmUkmWRLYQ1u_Mg043gC-tX3Ea2VQEDfDufysRK2MKCmkVJlRGG7NGqqkE=&c=Z8fR2i3RTHV0duV51M4j_fyvEvUMCTqEoV_t-0CVts-Qz884VwZVSA==&ch=cejN9B1VXPf1aZTIbqkYb35nbc-WbAg4VDLJ3BAWpg-qDxUoR-jsxQ==).

Earlier this month, [Jill won the Prince William County GOP's straw poll with 57% of the vote](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00145QqqcuWKp3_dGfPfAgXG4UsHhLlGdkLsosM8WI_XgRgd7EvnL4O_5Izl-0VjcoQIcNep404_SZXR5JQAo_ChqpahPtXT8SAydX-b8eC4-oqn9XJCuQWxjk957WAkFaKBFji0beK2mBNmnzl0uOlRoKTC8CSHvmdSXrhMhZbpL1jZ-fbCelAYgUQQde6-vDr2SKBPIrdBrU7kJ4_cWxpdFpVDYwoD6rY73LI5YY_8Cq6StfvZb5gBYpudR8G4JqQWUCUBfAottijGSi8ZSKoj-v0zfMv4uqV&c=Z8fR2i3RTHV0duV51M4j_fyvEvUMCTqEoV_t-0CVts-Qz884VwZVSA==&ch=cejN9B1VXPf1aZTIbqkYb35nbc-WbAg4VDLJ3BAWpg-qDxUoR-jsxQ==) in a three way race.
Last Monday, [Jill earned the endorsement of VCDL-PAC](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00145QqqcuWKp3_dGfPfAgXG4UsHhLlGdkLsosM8WI_XgRgd7EvnL4O_93A9jiynMNlsfMlAhp_ZaMTk2hMa94ZheYIBt4uLELNJzpAn-vgIDTIrqOtOUtCGnUHw3C9K5WqcAAvPJxHRKTd8jf9aHIUR6mF1svpT-75_vGn2gDoSyHQXdDBs33fiFOaJSy8Zm2DoOG95S1_ojcnAB3Dhjn9lr-JSpp_A1s_rPGIdwF7ybTL3if3trfNug6Tzr7nV5tk&c=Z8fR2i3RTHV0duV51M4j_fyvEvUMCTqEoV_t-0CVts-Qz884VwZVSA==&ch=cejN9B1VXPf1aZTIbqkYb35nbc-WbAg4VDLJ3BAWpg-qDxUoR-jsxQ==) for her steadfast record of defending and expanding Virginians' Second Amendment rights.

Last week, our campaign team turned in over 15,000 signatures \- a [field-leading signature total](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00145QqqcuWKp3_dGfPfAgXG4UsHhLlGdkLsosM8WI_XgRgd7EvnL4O_93A9jiynMNl4OU_KxLKksDfbnNLX-sjSdv__SM8LBB9exduZpuZzmS69wGJvWxrC0lEOEo4xRZQyluDIclavjDTG9lEQD952yz5lZzp8y7bR2TqqBRYDAdxDbQVoWlUvS0IJx3FamAypGzddfqVWpX-kaet-y1dhA==&c=Z8fR2i3RTHV0duV51M4j_fyvEvUMCTqEoV_t-0CVts-Qz884VwZVSA==&ch=cejN9B1VXPf1aZTIbqkYb35nbc-WbAg4VDLJ3BAWpg-qDxUoR-jsxQ==) to qualify for June's primary ballot - with tremendous help from more than 400 volunteers.

name: Russ Feingold
subject: No one -- except us
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
body:
Folks are really excited about this project. They're eager to work toward something bigger. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46d7/1c469400/2e0ec86/3548fab/2698948733/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitaction_donate?refcode=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&source=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1") Friend, We can't lose sight of the forest for the trees here. Increasingly, it seems Washington is consumed by tweets, scandals, and figuring out who to point the finger at next. While the noise is distracting, we must not let it distract us from the grave threats facing the legitimacy of our democracy. Amid the noise in Washington, almost no one is focusing on the ongoing assaults to voting rights and our campaign finance system. Except us. I founded LegitAction to address the pillars of legitimacy that are most under threat right now. We're new, but we're already stepping up. [_**Now to make sure we get this organization off to a strong start, we 're asking supporters to help raise $75,000 before the end of the month. Contribute $3 today to help reach our goal before midnight tomorrow.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46d7/1c469400/2e0ec86/3548fa9/2698948733/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitaction_donate?refcode=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Now+to+make+sure+we+get+this+organizatio&utm_campaign=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&source=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46d7/1c469400/2e0ec86/3548fa6/2698948733/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitaction_donate?refcode=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&source=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1") Folks are really excited about this project. They're eager to work toward something bigger, instead of constantly chasing President Trump's blunder of the day. That's why they've already helped us raise $47,311 of the $75,000 we need. But we're not there yet. I hope you can step up today, before tomorrow's deadline. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46d7/1c469400/2e0ec86/3548fa7/2698948733/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitaction_donate?refcode=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1&source=20170330_r4w_EOQ1_msg1")

body:
| We have a critical task ahead: We need to take back our country in 2018.

Chris is fighting tooth and nail to make sure Senate Democrats can hold the line and stop Donald Trump and his billionaire friends.

[**But the stakes are high --can you help out? Tomorrow is the quarterly fundraising deadline, and we need to come out strong. Contribute now.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b11/70cdc2ba/4748e4c0/397febb/4087560426/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033017_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+But+the+stakes+are+highmdashcan+you+help&utm_campaign=em033017_2&source=em033017_2")

Next year, 25 members of our Senate caucus are up for re-election, compared to only 8 Republican senators. That means 10 of our senators running in 2018 need to win in states that Trump just won -- like Indiana, Missouri, Montana and West Virginia -- while only one of the Republican senators running comes from a state that Hillary Clinton carried (Nevada).

The map is tough, but we are up for the challenge. The American people have been awakened and are ready to be fully engaged in this fight.

**Too much hangs in the balance -- we can't afford to fall short. Say you're with us tonight.**

[**http://action.vanhollen.org/CVH-FEC_2017**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b11/70cdc2ba/4748e4c0/397feb8/4087560426/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033017_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+httpactionvanhollenorgCVHFEC2017&utm_campaign=em033017_2&source=em033017_2")

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is just the first step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our performance at this crucial deadline will set the tone for 2017. Will you help out and chip in NOW before the deadline?
|

---
Friends, For over a year now, House Bill 2 has been a dark cloud over our great state. It has stained our reputation. It has discriminated against our people. And it has caused great economic harm to many of our communities. We never should have had to suffer under House Bill 2, but the former Governor and Legislature forced it on North Carolina anyway. Today, we repealed House Bill 2. We begin to end discrimination. We begin to bring back jobs and sporting events. And we begin to repair our reputation. It is an important step, but it cannot be the only step. This is not a perfect deal or my preferred solution. It stops short of many things we need to do as a state. With HB2 in place, local governments could not pass protections for their LGBT employees. With this law I just signed, now they can. With HB2 in place, local governments could not pass laws to protect LGBT people in their contracting. With this law I just signed, now they can. And this new law provides for even more LGBT protections in the future. This is just the first step -- I will continue to work hard for statewide protections for North Carolina's LGBT citizens. In North Carolina our people are welcoming. They overwhelmingly oppose HB2, but are being harmed by this damaging law anyway. Today's compromise will stop the economic damage hurting our families and businesses and it makes progress toward our ultimate goal of making North Carolina a place that works for everyone. Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina, Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---
